```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} #library(plyr) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(repr) library(dplyr) library(DT) library(highcharter) library(shiny) library(ggiraph) library(googlesheets4) library(shinydashboard) library(shinyWidgets) ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} sheet_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12BlvL_Fxdubk5PL4G-pjX-c4_iQwiubVlknHCrAw5dw/edit?gid=904243310#gid=904243310" b2c_aio <- read_sheet(sheet_url, sheet = "Chi tiết") b2c_aio <- b2c_aio[-c(1:4),c(1,2,3,10:20,22:27, 29:34, 36:44, 48, 52, 53, 55:67,51)] n_aio <- c("don_huy", "ma_tinh", "ma_hd", "gtri", "namthang_ky", "ngay_ky", "dich_vu", "thang_DT", "ngay_tam_ung", "gtri_tam_ung", "loai_pin", "ma_pin", "ten_pin", "so_pin", "ngay_cap_pin", "dambao_pin", "loai_inver", "ma_inver", "ten_inver", "so_inver", "ngay_cap_inver", "dambao_inver", "loai_acquy", "ma_acquy", "ten_acquy", "so_acquy", "ngay_cap_acquy", "dambao_acquy", "du_hang", "du_dk", "so_hd", "tyle_tamung", "am", "han_thicong", "so_ngau_tamung", "thang_dk_DT", "mat_bang", "quahan_thicong", "BG_VHKT", "tien_do", "ngay_thicong_xong", "ngay_BBNT", "vuong", "vuong_chitiet", "do_chacchan_VHKT", "ngay_dien_thicong", "ngay_BG_sang", "thang_ky", "nam_ky", "today_ngayBG", "today_ngaythicong", "chac_chan") colnames(b2c_aio) <- n_aio #Chuyển các cột list định dạng giống ngày về date %m-%Y b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>% rowwise() %>% mutate(namthang_ky = toString(unlist(namthang_ky))) %>% mutate(thang_dk_DT = toString(unlist(thang_dk_DT))) %>% ungroup() b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>% mutate( namthang_ky = ifelse( is.na(namthang_ky), NA_character_, format( as.Date(namthang_ky, format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y" ) ) ) %>% mutate( thang_dk_DT = ifelse( is.na(thang_dk_DT), NA_character_, format( as.Date(thang_dk_DT, format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y" ) ) ) ####Chuyển tất cả các cột list về number b2c_aio1[] <- b2c_aio1 %>% mutate(across(where(is.list), ~ { lens <- lengths(.) max_len <- max(lens) lapply(., function(x) { if(length(x) < max_len) c(unlist(x), rep(NA, max_len - length(x))) else unlist(x) }) })) %>% mutate(across(where(is.list), unlist)) ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} b2c_aio1 %>% drop_na(ma_hd) -> b2c_aio1 thang_n <- format(as.Date(today(), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y") thang_n1 <- format(as.Date(Sys.Date() %m+% months(1), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y") thang_n2 <- format(as.Date(Sys.Date() %m+% months(2), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y") ``` ### **1. Chi tiết theo tỉnh tiến độ HĐ dự kiến lên DT tháng ** `r thang_n` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} b2c_aio1 %>% filter(thang_dk_DT == thang_n) %>% group_by(ma_tinh, am) %>% summarise(gtri_dk = sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd)], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6, gtri_dt = round(sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & !is.na(thang_DT)], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,0), ty_le = gtri_dt*100/gtri_dk) -> bc_dk_dt ``` ```{r,out.width = '120%',fig.width=7, fig.height=4, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} highchart() %>% hc_chart(type = "column") %>% hc_xAxis(categories = bc_dk_dt$ma_tinh, labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria"))) %>% hc_title(text = "Tỷ lệ dự kiến doanh thu tháng hiện tại", margin = 20, align = "center", style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",fontFamily = "cambria",fontSize = "20px") ) %>% hc_yAxis_multiples(list(lineWidth = 3, title = list(text = "Dự kiến DT", style=list(fontWeight = "bold",fontSize = "15px",fontFamily = "cambria")), labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria"))), list(showLastLabel = TRUE, opposite = TRUE, title = list(text = "%HT", style=list(fontWeight = "bold",fontSize = "15px",fontFamily = "cambria")), labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria")))) %>% hc_add_series(name = "Tổng DT dự kiến", data = round(bc_dk_dt$gtri_dk,0), tooltip = list(columnFormat = paste0("Dự kiến", "\n",accounting(bc_dk_dt$gtri_hd, big.mark = ",", digits = 2L, format = "d"), "TTQH"))) %>% hc_add_series(name = "Đã lên DT",data = round(bc_dk_dt$gtri_dt,0)) %>% hc_add_series(name = "Tỷ lệ (%)",data = round(bc_dk_dt$ty_le,0), type = "spline", yAxis = 1,dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{y}%")) %>% hc_tooltip(headerFormat = "{point.key}
", pointFormat = "{series.name}: {point.y}") %>% hc_colors(c("#D9D9D9", "#C84309","#645889")) %>% hc_legend(labels = list(style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",fontFamily = "cambria",fontSize = "20px"))) %>% hc_exporting( enabled = TRUE, filename = "custom-file-name" ) ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} b2c_aio1 %>% round(sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & is.na(thang_DT) & chac_chan == "Chắc chắn"], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,0), so_chua_dt_50 = so_chua_dt - so_chua_dt_chac, gtri_chua_dt_50 = gtri_chua_dt - gtri_chua_dt_chac) ->
